name: @apollo/client-react-streaming
description: This package provides building blocks to create framework-level integration of Apollo Client with React's streaming SSR. See the [@apollo/client-integration-nextjs](https://github.com/apollographql/apollo-client-integrations/tree/main/packages/nextjs) pac
